Documentation

RustMinerSystem configuration reference

Configure RustMinerSystem listen addresses, pool endpoints, worker credentials, and logging.

Configuration

Basic Configuration

# config.toml example
[server]
listen = "0.0.0.0:3333"

[pool]
endpoint = "pool.example.com:443"
worker = "your_worker_name"
password = "your_password"

[log]
level = "info"

Configuration Reference

Field Description
server.listen Local listen address for RustMinerSystem
pool.endpoint Upstream pool or self-hosted node address
pool.worker Worker name or account identifier
pool.password Pool connection password
log.level Log level
Previous InstallationNext Operations

Reading time

1 min read

On this page

Basic ConfigurationConfiguration Reference
RustMinerSystem

RustMinerSystem focuses on third-party pool proxying and PoolNode real-pool operations, with RMS available as an optional local compression tool.
